Study Title: A Study of Multiple Immunotherapy-Based Treatment Combinations in Participants With Metastatic Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma (Morpheus-Pancreatic Cancer)
Intervention(s): Atezolizumab + AB928 vs Atezolizumab + Bevacizumab vs Atezolizumab + Selicrelumab vs Atezolizumab + Tiragolumab vs Atezolizumab + Tocilizumab vs Atezolizumab + BL-8040 vs Atezolizumab + Cobimetinib vs Atezolizumab + PEGPH20 vs Atezolizumab + RO6874281
Trial Summary: The Morpheus-Pancreatic Cancer trial is a completed Phase Ib/II study that evaluated the safety, tolerability, and preliminary anti-tumor activity of various immunotherapy-based treatment combinations in 341 participants with metastatic Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma. This trial is relevant to the gastric-cancer landscape as it explores novel combinations of immunotherapies, potentially offering new therapeutic options for a cancer type with limited treatment advancements.
